meaning: n.(主要用于赛马,赛狗的)跑道
examples: You can't cross the road—it's like a racetrack.
Some sensors are copied straight from the racetrack.
Is it necessary to wear the racetrack on your head as well?
Single people, nobody is stopping you from buying the racetrack-friendly Lotus Elise you lust after.
His temperament can handle it and, more importantly, he doesn't need a special racetrack.
